steps.title: Express a as a percentage of b
steps.content:
The number $a$ is 65% less than $b$, so subtract 65% of $b$ from $b$ itself:
$$a = b - 0.65b = 0.35b$$

steps.title: Find c in terms of b
steps.content:
The number $c$ is 60% greater than $a$, so $c = a + 0.60a = 1.60a$. Substitute $a = 0.35b$:
$$c = 1.60a = 1.60(0.35b) = 0.56b$$
Thus $c$ is 0.56 times $b$. The answer is .56.
